text:
August 22, 2023
Removed and re-inserted SATA PCIe card. Re-attached external SATA cables.
Booted into FBSD-12.4
Turned on one eSata external enclosure: ahcich errors appeared (despite what was reported before).

Am waiting on new SATA PCIe cards. Will install, retest, and report after they arrive.
